name: Sailfish Royalty Corp.
summary: Sailfish Royalty Corp. operates as a precious metals royalty and streaming company in the Americas. The company also explores for gold and silver deposits. It owns the TZ Royalty, which is a 2.75% net smelter return (NSR) in the Tocantinzinho gold project in the Tapajos district of northern Brazil; and a gold stream equivalent to a 3% NSR on the San Albino gold project and a 2% NSR on the rest of the area surrounding San Albino in northern Nicaragua, as well as an up to 3% NSR on the Spring Valley gold project in Pershing County, Nevada. The company also holds NSR in properties located in Zacatecas and Chihuahua, Mexico, as well as holds 100% interests in the Gavilanes Property located in Durango, Mexico. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Road Town, the British Virgin Islands.
